issues.detail: Missing error handling for network failures and empty data states.
Examples and code snippets are React-specific, limiting applicability to other frameworks.

scenarios.name: Admin users table with sort, search, pagination, bulk-delete
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produced an outline-only TanStack snippet missing some row-model imports and selection handlers, whereas treatment wired getCoreRowModel/getSortedRowModel/getFilteredRowModel/getPaginationRowModel, globalFilter state, and getSelectedRowModel().rows.map(r => r.original) for bulk delete.

scenarios.name: Server-side paginated table against /api/users
scenarios.rationale: Baseline tried to use built-in pagination plus a fetch hook, while treatment correctly set manualPagination/manualSorting, supplied pageCount from server, and refetched in useEffect on [pagination, sorting] with pageIndex, pageSize, sortBy, sortDir.
